# Soft45 Async34 Swarm350 Contract

## Soft 45
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.45 so full summaries start earlier under long sessions

## Async 34
async pre-rot and swarm micro pressure default to 0.34 so reclaim starts earlier

## Swarm 350
